deals.title: Gratis Probetraining bei @aura.vitality.wien
deals.description: Buche jetzt dein kostenloses Probetraining samt professionellem Analysegespräch! AURA Vitality - Dein Self Service Biohacking Studio in 1180 Wien. Link in Bio -->auravitality.at #auravitality #biohacking #beckenbodentraining #1180 Quelle: TikTok @aura.vitality.wien.

deals.title: @viennaphilharmonic Angebot
deals.description: 2 more days until our Summer Night Concert 2026 We recommend getting to the Summer Night Concert by bike or via public transportation. We do not recommend coming by car due to very limited availability of parking spaces. Arrive early, as access may be limited once capacity is reached. The gates open at 5 PM Admission is free of charge, no ticket required! The concert starts on June 19th at 20:45 🎶💫🎻🤗 #schönbrunn #classicalmusic #vienna #thingstodoinvienna Quelle: TikTok @viennaphilharmonic.

deals.title: Gratis Eintritt bei @vienna.info
deals.description: the countdown is on for the Summer Night Concert 😍 📅 Friday, 19 June 2026, 8:45pm 📍Schönbrunn Palace Park, Vienna 🎶 Vienna Philharmonic 🎫 Free entry, no tickets required Will I see you there? 💕 Quelle: TikTok @vienna.info.

deals.title: @viennavibes43 Angebot
deals.description: The newest thing to see in Vienna after dark 🌙 (MUSEUM OF CHANGE) ✨ Opened in 2025 as one of the city’s newest attractions 🎶 Stunning projections, sound, and visual effects 🌃 The perfect place to end a day of exploring Vienna 🆓 Free to visit and perfect for an evening walk #vienna #wien #austria #ViennaLife #visitaustria Quelle: TikTok @viennavibes43.
